query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.isLive, p.liveStartDate, 
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM portfolioTransactions pt WHERE pt.portfolioId = p.id) as txCount
FROM savedPortfolios p
WHERE p.name LIKE '%Regula%' OR p.name LIKE '%live%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, p.isLive, p.liveStartDate, 
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM portfolioTransactions pt WHERE pt.portfolioId = p.id) as txCount
FROM savedPortfolios p
WHERE p.name LIKE '%Regula%' OR p.name LIKE '%live%';
